# Shunya

> Shunya is an Indian CA services platform that simplifies company registration and corporate compliance. We help Indian businesses register Private Limited companies, LLPs, and OPCs online — fast, affordable, and 100% compliant. We also handle 15CA/15CB filings for foreign remittances and company closure (strike-off) through a CA-assisted online process.

## Core Services

- [Company Registration](https://shunya.so/): Register a Private Limited Company, LLP, or OPC in India online — end-to-end CA-assisted process.
- [15CA/15CB Filing](https://shunya.so/15ca-15cb): Get Form 15CA and Form 15CB filed by a CA for foreign remittance payments — no office visit required.
- [Company Closure](https://shunya.so/company-closure): Close a private limited company or LLP in India via Fast Track Exit (FTE) under Section 248 of the Companies Act.
- [CCFS-2026 Company Closure](https://shunya.so/ccfs-2026-company-closure): MCA's CCFS-2026 scheme reduces the government fee for company closure to ₹2,500 (from ₹10,000) — CA-assisted, transparent pricing, no payment until you approve.
- [Startup India Registration](https://shunya.so/startup-india): Get DPIIT recognition under the Startup India scheme.
- [Free Consultation](https://shunya.so/consultation): Book a free call with a CA to discuss your compliance needs.
- [How It Works](https://shunya.so/how-it-works): Step-by-step walkthrough of the Shunya process.

- [Who Files Form 15CA — Remitter or Bank?](https://shunya.so/15ca-15cb/who-files-form-15ca-remitter-bank)
- [Google Ads and Meta Ads Payments from India — 15CA/15CB Requirements](https://shunya.so/15ca-15cb/15ca-15cb-google-ads-meta-ads-india)
